generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance OccupancyActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control device for occupancy-based lighting/HVAC adjustments in BIM model, configured by Building Control Engineers for dynamic tenant-specific control logic"
]

instance TemperatureActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC controller actuator for real-time temperature regulation in BIM-based building infrastructure, integrated with runtime middleware for dynamic control policies"
]

instance MotionActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting system actuator for motion detection and adaptive lighting control within BIM-defined zones"
]

instance EnergyManagementActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Centralized energy management actuator coordinating HVAC, lighting, and renewable systems based on predictive analytics outputs"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor configured within BIM model to capture real-time occupancy metrics for data-driven decision-making in operational phase"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing operational temperature data (e.g., room temperature, ambient conditions) from building control systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring humidity levels within BIM-defined zones for environmental monitoring and comfort optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataStream
]

instance MotionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion detection sensor providing real-time occupancy patterns for adaptive building control systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionDataStream
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance MotionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotionSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMBuildingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched BIM model representing the physical building infrastructure (Living Lab facility) as the semantic backbone for the model-driven Digital Twin, integrating static geometry with runtime metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMValidationTool, BIMToDTTransformer
]

instance OperationalDataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Centralized runtime data repository storing real-time sensor data (occupancy, temperature, humidity, motion) and control signals from building control systems via Eclipse Hono/Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataStream, TemperatureDataStream, HumidityDataStream, MotionDataStream
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization model created in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and user interaction with the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model containing control logic definitions for actuators (e.g., lighting, HVAC) configured by Building Control Engineers in BIM tools"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RuntimeMiddlewareConfigurator
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) enabling bidirectional communication between physical building components and Digital Twin runtime"
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing interactive 3D visualization capabilities for immersive Digital Twin experience"
]

instance BIMValidationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model validation tool (e.g., clash detection) ensuring semantic consistency between BIM and Digital Twin components before deployment"
]

instance BIMToDTTransformer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation pipeline automating extraction of device metadata (tenant IDs, endpoint addresses) from BIM models for DT artifact generation"
]

instance RuntimeMiddlewareConfigurator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework automating runtime interface generation from BIM models to create deployable DT artifacts for middleware integration"
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time monitoring of building operational metrics (energy consumption, occupancy patterns) via Unreal Engine visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationModel
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyMonitoringInsight, EnergyConsumptionInsight
]

instance PredictiveOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service optimizing building operations (lighting/HVAC) using AI-driven control logic and historical data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlLogicModel
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyAction, ComfortOptimizationAction
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service integration platform enabling deployment of custom plugins (e.g., AI-driven control logic, IoT analytics) via standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeMiddlewareConfigurator
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomControlPolicy, IoTAnalyticsService
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy patterns derived from motion sensors for operational decision-making and space utilization optimization"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics (HVAC, lighting) enabling data-driven optimization of building operational efficiency"
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control actions adjusting HVAC/lighting based on predictive analytics to maximize energy efficiency without manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ComfortOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "AI-driven comfort adjustments (temperature, lighting) that dynamically adapt to tenant occupancy patterns and environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomControlPolicy : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic control policies implemented via custom plugins (e.g., BOREALIS) that update parameters in real-time without redeployment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance IoTAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Integration of IoT data analytics providing advanced insights for building management and predictive maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingOperationalEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, MotionSensor,
             OccupancyActuator, TemperatureActuator, MotionActuator, EnergyManagementActuator,
             BIMBuildingModel, OperationalDataStore, VisualizationModel, ControlLogicModel,
             EclipseHono, UnrealEngine5, BIMValidationTool, BIMToDTTransformer,
             RuntimeMiddlewareConfigurator, RealTimeMonitoringService,
             PredictiveOptimizationService, CustomServiceIntegration
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Facilitates **control signal transmission** from the DT back to the physical building infrastructure. The DT generates control outputs (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC optimizations) via standardized APIs integrated with Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware, enabling real-time adjustments to BCS. This bidirectional communication is critical for adaptive control strategies (e.g., reinforcement learning-based lighting optimization in BOREALIS), ensuring the DT dynamically influences operational behavior."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Operates on a **real-time (sub-second to near-real-time) time scale** for critical operational data synchronization. The DT ensures **low-latency bidirectional communication** between physical and virtual assets via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto), enabling live updates of sensor data and control signals. The framework prioritizes **low-latency transformations** during model-driven deployment to minimize synchronization delays."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrates a **unified DT ecosystem** centered around a **centralized DT framework** that integrates multiple services (e.g., monitoring, control, analytics) via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). The DT constellation includes:
  - A **BIM-based semantic backbone** for spatial and functional representation.
  - **Decentralized service modules** (e.g., lighting, HVAC, energy) managed via extension points.
  - **Real-time synchronization** between physical assets and virtual models, ensuring interoperability across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire **building lifecycle**, from **design (ideal representation)** to **construction (manufacturing phase)** and **operation (as-built monitoring)**. The DT is deployed as a **dynamic, operational model** that evolves with physical changes (e.g., refurbishments) via automated model updates and runtime configuration management. The framework ensures compatibility with BIM standards across all phases, enabling seamless transitions between design, construction, and operational DTs."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Ensures **high fidelity and validity** through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** to evaluate alignment between physical and virtual models.
  - **Automated model validation** (e.g., clash detection) during deployment to minimize semantic drift.
  - **Runtime synchronization** via low-latency middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to maintain real-time coherence.
  The framework emphasizes **verification/validation mechanisms** (e.g., iterative testing with a Living Lab case study) to address uncertainty and errors in dynamic DT environments."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs bidirectional communication via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware, facilitating real-time data exchange using standardized protocols. The technical connection ensures low-latency synchronization between physical and virtual components, with no specific mention of MQTT or RESTful APIs in the documents. The architecture supports scalable deployment across heterogeneous networks."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed via an **automated, service-oriented pipeline** that integrates BIM models with middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) and visualization tools (Unreal Engine). While the exact hosting environment (e.g., cloud vs. on-premise) is not specified, the framework emphasizes modularity and extensibility, allowing deployment on scalable infrastructure. The process is fully automated except for initial BIM modeling and device configuration."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration occurs through standardized extension points enabling modular service integration with external systems. The framework leverages BIM tools for interoperability with other AECO stakeholders, facilitating collaboration across disciplines (e.g., architects, engineers) while maintaining semantic coherence via BIM semantics."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents, but the framework assumes **data ownership by the PT owner** (e.g., building operator) while ensuring **compliance with privacy standards** (e.g., GDPR) through secure middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) and anonymized data processing."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to the following standards:
  - **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the semantic backbone for building representation.
  - **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for real-time data exchange and middleware integration.
  - **Unreal Engine 5** for visualization, though proprietary.
  - **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM) for interoperability, though no explicit mention of IFC or COBie in the provided context."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations are **not explicitly detailed** in the documents. The framework focuses on real-time data synchronization and interoperability but does not address cybersecurity protocols (e.g., TLS, access controls), remote operation risks, or safety protocols for human interactions with the physical building."
]
